items.description: Good360 Newest Board Members Good360 Alexandria, VA, Oct. 01, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Good360, the global leader in product philanthropy and purposeful giving, today announced the appointment of four executives to its Board of Directors: Stephanie Dexter, Lori Freeman, Patrick Gaston and Jonathan Ireland. items.title: Is Veeva's Vault CRM Emerging as the Standard for Top Biopharma?
items.description: VEEV's Vault CRM is gaining traction with top biopharma firms like Merck, Gilead, and BMS, signaling its rise as the industry's commercial standard.
